name: Divine Triple Chocolate Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. Mix flour and shortening until crumbly.
3. Gradually add cold water and salt, stirring until dough forms a ball.
4. Wrap in plastic wrap and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes.
5. Roll out dough on a floured surface and transfer to a pie dish.
6. Bake the crust in preheated oven for about 15-20 minutes or until lightly golden.
7. Melt semi-sweet chocolate separately.
8. Pour melted chocolate over baked crust.
9. Chill the pie for at least an hour before serving.
